name: Acrobatics
description: Balance, tumbling, and staying upright in difficult movement.

name: Animal Handling
description: Calm, direct, or read natural animal behavior.

name: Arcana
description: Recall magical lore, spell traditions, and arcane symbols.

name: Athletics
description: Climb, jump, swim, grapple, and force movement with strength.

name: Deception
description: Convincing lies, feints, and misleading social behavior.

name: History
description: Recall historical events, legends, wars, and civilizations.

name: Insight
description: Read intent, emotions, and hidden motives.

name: Intimidation
description: Use presence, threats, or force of personality to influence.

name: Investigation
description: Deductive searching, clues, and close inspection.

name: Nature
description: Knowledge of terrain, flora, fauna, weather, and natural cycles.

name: Perception
description: Spot hidden details through sight, hearing, or smell.

name: Performance
description: Entertain through music, acting, dance, or storytelling.

name: Persuasion
description: Influence others with tact, diplomacy, and confidence.

name: Religion
description: Recall deities, rites, prayers, and religious history.

name: Sleight of Hand
description: Pick pockets, palm objects, and fine manual trickery.

name: Survival
description: Track, forage, navigate wilds, and endure hazards.
